description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped rock with a predominantly pale, off-white coloration and subtle pinkish and grayish undertones. Its surface is rough and uneven, featuring natural cracks, crevices, and weathered indentations that suggest exposure to the elements. The rock has a somewhat triangular profile with rounded edges and a bulky, solid mass, making it appear heavy and substantial. Veins and mineral streaks are visible across its surface, adding to its naturalistic appearance. The texture is coarse, with no visible signs of artificial shaping or smoothing, and the rock lacks any human-made markings or modifications. Its size and form make it suitable as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A large, pale, roughly triangular rock with a coarse, weathered surface and subtle pink and gray veining. Its irregular shape and heavy appearance make it a naturalistic urban barrier or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rock's broad, sloping top surface with visible mineral veins and a prominent rounded edge.
description_view_1: This angle shows a more compact, blocky side with deeper crevices and a slightly more angular profile.
description_view_2: The rock appears more triangular from this perspective, with pronounced surface texture and a visible indentation near the base.
description_view_3: This view reveals a smoother, more bulbous side with subtle color variations and fewer deep cracks.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped public space
